description: Standard tag taxonomy for HeyReach LinkedIn outbound operations. Tags are shared with GHL and Instantly via n8n signal routing.

signal.description: Engagement signals detected from LinkedIn activity

connection_accepted.automation: Schedule first follow-up message (24h delay for MENA, 12h for US)

replied_positive.automation: Alert user, pause email sequence, create GHL opportunity

replied_negative.description: Lead replied with not interested / rejection
replied_negative.automation: Stop lead in campaign, tag in GHL as not_interested

replied_neutral.description: Lead replied with question or neutral response

liked_post.description: Lead liked sender's or company's LinkedIn post

sequence_complete_no_reply.description: Lead finished full LinkedIn sequence without engaging
sequence_complete_no_reply.automation: Route to email channel (Instantly) after 7-day cooldown

connection_request_sent.description: Connection request was sent to lead

rules: Signal tags are additive — a lead can have multiple signal tags
Score tags should reflect the LATEST signal (replace, don't stack)
All signal tags should be synced to GHL via n8n webhook processing

geo.description: Geographic market classification for sender mapping and content localization

values.mena: Gulf/MENA region (UAE, KSA, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman)

rules: Geo tags are permanent — assigned at list creation based on lead data
Used for sender-to-lead mapping (MENA accounts → MENA leads)
Affects timing schedules (Sun-Thu for MENA, Mon-Fri for US)

score.description: Lead temperature based on cumulative engagement signals

values.hot: High engagement — replied positively, InMail response, meeting interest. Score ≥7.
values.warm: Moderate engagement — connection accepted, neutral reply. Score 4-6.
values.cold: No engagement or negative response. Score ≤3.

rules: Score tags are MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE — replace, never stack
Score should reflect latest signal, not cumulative history
Hot leads should trigger immediate alert to user
Score syncs to GHL signal_score custom field via n8n
Source tags are permanent — set once at import, never changed
Used for lead quality analysis (which sources produce best engagement)

values.vp_sales: VP Sales / Head of Sales / CRO
values.vp_marketing: VP Marketing / CMO / Head of Growth
values.sme_owner: SME business owner (for SalesMfast SME product)

rules: ICP tags should match the campaign's target audience
Used for personalization and sequence selection
Cross-reference with position field in lead data

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the lead

values.sequenced: Added to a campaign, sequence in progress

rules: Status tags are MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE — replace old with new
Status progression: new → sequenced → engaged → meeting_booked
Or: new → sequenced → not_interested → dormant
Campaign tags are additive — lead can have multiple if re-enrolled over time
Used for attribution analysis
Format: campaign:{descriptive_slug}

heyreach_to_ghl.trigger: HeyReach webhook → n8n → GHL contact update

heyreach_to_instantly.trigger: HeyReach webhook → n8n → Instantly lead tag
heyreach_to_instantly.action: Pause email sequence if LinkedIn reply received
